errors.missingAiConfigDescription: There is no image model configured in the Admin panel.
errors.noSlidesForGenerate: There are no slides prepared to generate. Press "Analyze" first.
errors.generationDescription: The carousel could not be generated.
errors.missingTopic: Please enter a topic for the carousel.
errors.noSlidesForPreview: There are no slides prepared for preview. Press "Analyze" first.
errors.regenerateSlide: The slide could not be regenerated.
errors.minimumSlidesDetailed: This carousel type requires at least {{count}} slides (hook + content + CTA). Adjust the number to continue.
errors.minimumSlides: This carousel type requires more slides than the selected ones. Adjust the number to continue.

ui.workPanelDescription: Swipe to open or close it without losing the preview.
ui.whatToCreate: What do you want to create?
ui.promptPlaceholder: Ex: I want to deliver real value. Give me the 5 typical mistakes Spanish speakers make when speaking English and how to fix them.
ui.advancedModeDescription: Advanced mode: you manually choose the layout.
ui.basicModeDescription: Basic mode is active: the layout is selected automatically based on what you write. Enable advanced mode if you want more control.
ui.styleTypographyTitle: Apply the style to fonts too
ui.styleTypographyDescription: If enabled, typography will inherit the visual language of the style more strongly.
ui.linkDescription: Enable the link if you want to show a URL on the last slide.
ui.retryCarousel: Generate another carousel with the same settings
ui.editSlidePlaceholder: Describe the changes to edit the slide...
ui.setupCarouselPlaceholder: Set up your carousel in the side panel...
ui.formatVerticalDescription: 1080x1350 · the safest standard to avoid cropping on older devices or Meta Ads.
ui.formatTallDescription: 1080x1440 · +6.6% more screen space · dominates the feed and fits the new vertical grid.
ui.formatSquareDescription: 1080x1080 · the original classic format for balanced layouts.
ui.unsavedChangesDescription: If you continue to {{action}}, you will lose the changes in this session. What would you like to do?
ui.deleteThisSessionDescription: This carousel session will be deleted. The saved content from this session will no longer be available.
ui.deleteAllSessionsDescription: The entire carousel session history for this Brand Kit will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
ui.pendingStructuralChanges: There are pending structural changes. The current preview may be based on a previous analysis. Reanalyze before generating to rebuild the narrative with the current prompt, narrative, and number of slides.
ui.unsavedDialogTitle: There are unsaved changes. Do you want to save them?
ui.unsavedDialogDescription: If you continue without saving, you will lose the changes in this session.
ui.sessionDialogDescription: The first time you save this session you can give it a clear name to find it later.
ui.advancedCompositionTitle: Mix the best of each proposal
ui.advancedCompositionDescription: Open a wide editor to choose the best version of each slide without fighting the side panel.
ui.composeSlideBySlide: Build the carousel slide by slide
ui.composeSlideBySlideDescription: Each row represents one slide. Horizontally you see the original option and every available variant for that position.
ui.variantChangesInstant: Changes apply instantly while you choose variants.

toasts.suggestionAppliedDescription: The carousel copy has been updated.
toasts.changesRevertedDescription: The original content has been restored.
toasts.slideRemixedDescription: The carousel has been rebuilt with your mix of variants.

admin.savedAs: This composition is currently saved as
admin.manualChangesDescription: These buttons directly change the saved state of the active composition.
admin.automaticShortcutDescription: This button applies the automatic proposal exactly on the active composition.
admin.alreadyMatchesSuggestion: The composition already matches the suggestion
admin.compositionUpdatedDescription: {{name}} has been updated in the catalog.
admin.modeScopeDescription: `basic` enters auto-selection. `advanced` only appears when you work in advanced mode. `global` can be reused in any narrative. `narrative` only works inside its narrative.
admin.heuristicProposal: The heuristic suggests leaving it as
